problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: The key to What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? is Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis — specifically Vagus nerve stimulation — which would help 200,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
